name: Chris Brown

acts.description: Felony assault of Rihanna in 2009, leaving her with visible injuries before the Grammy Awards
Multiple subsequent assault allegations from other women

behavior_summary: Pleaded guilty to felony assault of Rihanna in 2009. Multiple subsequent abuse allegations from other women. Career largely unaffected, suggesting the industry and public chose to forgive — or ignore.

art.summary: Talented R&B performer whose early career showed genuine promise before his own choices overshadowed everything.

verdict.blurb: Beat his girlfriend so badly the photos made headlines, pleaded guilty, served no jail time, and still headlines festivals. The music industry's response to domestic violence has been a 15-year masterclass in looking the other way.
